name: Ant-Man
text: Puny Pest — Response: After you change to this form, remove 1 threat from a scheme.
real_text: Puny Pest — Response: After you change to this form, remove 1 threat from a scheme.
flavor: "Why don't you pick on somebody your own size?"

linked_card.name: Scott Lang
linked_card.text: Time to Unwind — Response: After you change to this form, heal 1 damage from Scott Lang.
linked_card.real_text: Time to Unwind — Response: After you change to this form, heal 1 damage from Scott Lang.
linked_card.flavor: "Being Cassie's hero is all I've ever wanted."

name: Ant-Man
text: Giant Nuisance — Response: After you change to this form, deal 1 damage to an enemy.
real_text: Giant Nuisance — Response: After you change to this form, deal 1 damage to an enemy.
flavor: "Oh Yeah, tiny dude is big now!"

name: Wasp
text: Hero Response: After Wasp enters play, deal 2 damage to an enemy if you are in [[Giant]] hero form or remove 2 threat from a scheme if you are in [[Tiny]] hero form.
real_text: Hero Response: After Wasp enters play, deal 2 damage to an enemy if you are in [[Giant]] hero form or remove 2 threat from a scheme if you are in [[Tiny]] hero form.

name: Giant Stomp
text: Play only if you are in [[Giant]] hero form. Hero Action (attack): Deal 1 damage to each minion. Deal 8 damage to an enemy.
real_text: Play only if you are in [[Giant]] hero form. Hero Action (attack): Deal 1 damage to each minion. Deal 8 damage to an enemy.
flavor: "I'd run if I were you." —Scott Lang

name: Hive Mind
text: Play only if you are in [[Tiny]] hero form. Hero Action (thwart): Remove 2 threat from a scheme. Remove 1 additional threat from that scheme for each Army of Ants support you control.
real_text: Play only if you are in [[Tiny]] hero form. Hero Action (thwart): Remove 2 threat from a scheme. Remove 1 additional threat from that scheme for each Army of Ants support you control.

name: Resize
text: Hero Action: Change to your other hero form. Draw 1 card.
real_text: Hero Action: Change to your other hero form. Draw 1 card.

name: Pym Particles
text: Hero Response: After you spend this card, heal 2 damage from your hero if you are in [[Giant]] hero form or draw 1 card if you are in [[Tiny]] hero form.
real_text: Hero Response: After you spend this card, heal 2 damage from your hero if you are in [[Giant]] hero form or draw 1 card if you are in [[Tiny]] hero form.

name: Army of Ants
text: Hero Action: If you are in [[Tiny]] hero form, exhaust Army of Ants → deal 1 damage to an enemy.
real_text: Hero Action: If you are in [[Tiny]] hero form, exhaust Army of Ants → deal 1 damage to an enemy.

name: Ant-Man's Helmet
text: Hero Response: After you change to [[Giant]] hero form, heal 2 damage from your hero. Hero Response: After you change to [[Tiny]] hero form, draw 1 card.
real_text: Hero Response: After you change to [[Giant]] hero form, heal 2 damage from your hero. Hero Response: After you change to [[Tiny]] hero form, draw 1 card.

name: Giant Strength
text: Hero Response: After you change to [[Giant]] hero form, you get +1 ATK until the end of this turn.
real_text: Hero Response: After you change to [[Giant]] hero form, you get +1 ATK until the end of this turn.
flavor: "My daughter lost her phone. I thought I'd look under these buildings." —Scott Lang

name: Wrist Gauntlets
text: Hero Action: If you are in [[Giant]] hero form, exhaust Wrist Gauntlets and spend [physical][physical] resources → stun an enemy. Hero Action: If you are in [[Tiny]] hero form, exhaust Wrist Gauntlets and spend [energy][energy] resources → confuse an enemy.
real_text: Hero Action: If you are in [[Giant]] hero form, exhaust Wrist Gauntlets and spend [physical][physical] resources → stun an enemy. Hero Action: If you are in [[Tiny]] hero form, exhaust Wrist Gauntlets and spend [energy][energy] resources → confuse an enemy.

name: Ant-Man
text: Ant-Man gets +1 hit point for each pym counter on him. Interrupt: When Ant-Man enters play, place 1 pym counter on him (to a maximum of 4) for each resource you overpaid for Ant-Man's cost.
real_text: Ant-Man gets +1 hit point for each pym counter on him. Interrupt: When Ant-Man enters play, place 1 pym counter on him (to a maximum of 4) for each resource you overpaid for Ant-Man's cost.

name: Giant-Man
text: Giant-Man gets +2 ATK while he has 3 or more remaining hit points.
real_text: Giant-Man gets +2 ATK while he has 3 or more remaining hit points.
flavor: "Size isn't everything. Unless you're stepping over a bridge."

name: Ronin
text: Ronin gets +1 THW and +1 ATK while an upgrade is attached to them.
real_text: Ronin gets +1 THW and +1 ATK while an upgrade is attached to them.
flavor: "Dunno who's wearing the suit this time, but they can definitely handle themself in a fight." —Spectrum

name: Stinger
text:
Play only if your identity has the [[Avenger]] trait.
Stinger does not count against your ally limit.
real_text:
Play only if your identity has the [[Avenger]] trait.
Stinger does not count against your ally limit.

name: Call for Aid
text: Hero Action: Discard cards from the top of your deck until you discard an [[Avenger]] ally, then add that ally to your hand.
real_text: Hero Action: Discard cards from the top of your deck until you discard an [[Avenger]] ally, then add that ally to your hand.

name: Moxie
text: Hero Response: After you change form, your hero gets +1 THW, +1 ATK, +1 DEF until the end of the round.
real_text: Hero Response: After you change form, your hero gets +1 THW, +1 ATK, +1 DEF until the end of the round.
flavor: "If you mess with one of us, you mess with all of us!" Even if I'm the last one." —Nova

name: Power Gloves
text: Attach to an [[Avenger]] ally. Max 1 per ally. Response: After attached ally attacks or thwarts, deal 1 damage to an enemy.
real_text: Attach to an [[Avenger]] ally. Max 1 per ally. Response: After attached ally attacks or thwarts, deal 1 damage to an enemy.

name: Reinforced Suit
text:
Attach to an ally. Max 1 per ally.
Attached ally gets +2 hit points.
real_text:
Attach to an ally. Max 1 per ally.
Attached ally gets +2 hit points.
flavor: "Remember, it's not just the suit that gives you power, it's how you use it." —Hank Pym
illustrator: Christopher Allen, Guru FX, & Roberto Poggi

name: First Aid
text: Action: Heal 2 damage from any character.
real_text: Action: Heal 2 damage from any character.
flavor: "Does it still qualify as first aid if it's your second day in the hospital?" —Clint Barton

name: Swarm Tactics
text: Team-Up (Ant-Man and Wasp). Max 1 per deck. Hero Action: Change to your other hero form. Ready your hero.
real_text: Team-Up (Ant-Man and Wasp). Max 1 per deck. Hero Action: Change to your other hero form. Ready your hero.

name: Energy
text: Max 1 per deck.
real_text: Max 1 per deck.

name: Genius
text: Max 1 per deck.
real_text: Max 1 per deck.

name: Strength
text: Max 1 per deck.
real_text: Max 1 per deck.

name: Team-Building Exercise
text: Hero Action: Exhaust Team-Building Exercise → play a card from your hand that shares a trait with your hero, reducing its resource cost by 1.
real_text: Hero Action: Exhaust Team-Building Exercise → play a card from your hand that shares a trait with your hero, reducing its resource cost by 1.

name: Care for Cassie
text: Give to the Scott Lang player. You may flip to alter-ego form. Choose: • Exhaust Scott Lang → remove Care for Cassie from the game. • Choose and discard 1 card from your hand. You cannot change form until your next turn ends. Discard this obligation.
real_text: Give to the Scott Lang player. You may flip to alter-ego form. Choose: • Exhaust Scott Lang → remove Care for Cassie from the game. • Choose and discard 1 card from your hand. You cannot change form until your next turn ends. Discard this obligation.

name: Tech Theft
text: Treat the printed text box of each [[Tech]] player card as if it were blank.
real_text: Treat the printed text box of each [[Tech]] player card as if it were blank.
flavor: Yellowjacket has stolen priceless Pym Particle technology.

name: Yellowjacket
text:
While you are in [[Giant]] hero form, Yellowjacket gains the [[Giant]] trait and retaliate 1.
While you are in [[Tiny]] hero form, Yellowjacket gains the [[Tiny]] trait and gets +1 ATK.
(Ant-Man's nemesis minion.)
real_text:
While you are in [[Giant]] hero form, Yellowjacket gains the [[Giant]] trait and retaliate 1.
While you are in [[Tiny]] hero form, Yellowjacket gains the [[Tiny]] trait and gets +1 ATK.
(Ant-Man's nemesis minion.)

name: Size Increase
text: Attach to Yellowjacket, if able. If you cannot, attach to the villain. Uses (3 counters). [star] Forced Response: After attached enemy activates, remove 1 size counter from here.
real_text: Attach to Yellowjacket, if able. If you cannot, attach to the villain. Uses (3 counters). [star] Forced Response: After attached enemy activates, remove 1 size counter from here.

name: Yellowjacket's Plan
text: When Revealed: Discard cards from the encounter deck until a card from the Ant-Man Nemesis set is discarded this way. Reveal that card.
real_text: When Revealed: Discard cards from the encounter deck until a card from the Ant-Man Nemesis set is discarded this way. Reveal that card.
flavor: "You think you can stop the future?!" —Yellowjacket

name: Moment of Triumph
text: Hero Response: After you attack and defeat an enemy, heal 1 damage from your hero for each point of excess damage dealt to that enemy by that attack.
real_text: Hero Response: After you attack and defeat an enemy, heal 1 damage from your hero for each point of excess damage dealt to that enemy by that attack.

name: Lay Down the Law
text: Hero Response (thwart): After you change form, remove 3 threat from a scheme (4 threat instead if you paid for this card using a [mental] resource).
real_text: Hero Response (thwart): After you change form, remove 3 threat from a scheme (4 threat instead if you paid for this card using a [mental] resource).

name: Muster Courage
text: Play only if your identity has the [[Avenger]] trait. Hero Action: Give up to X friendly characters a tough status card (to a maximum of 3 characters), where X is equal to the villain's stage number.
real_text: Play only if your identity has the [[Avenger]] trait. Hero Action: Give up to X friendly characters a tough status card (to a maximum of 3 characters), where X is equal to the villain's stage number.

name: Assess the Situation
text: Action: You get +1 hand size until the end of the phase.
real_text: Action: You get +1 hand size until the end of the phase.
flavor: "Well, if I run, that's not cool. And if I stay and get tasered, that's not cool either. I'm in a bit of a pickle." —Tony Stark
